title: Auto Repair Parts & Labor Quote Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for generating accurate repair quotes based on parts, labor, overhead, and profit margin, compliant with ISO 9001 and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Parts Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of replacement parts from supplier invoice.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of replacement parts from supplier invoice.

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Estimated technician hours based on standard repair times (e.g., Mitchell, ALLDATA).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated technician hours based on standard repair times (e.g., Mitchell, ALLDATA).

inputs.label: Labor Rate (USD/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Shop's hourly labor charge, typically includes overhead and profit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shop's hourly labor charge, typically includes overhead and profit.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to shop overhead (rent, utilities, admin).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of direct costs allocated to shop overhead (rent, utilities, admin).

inputs.label: Target Profit Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on total job cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired profit margin on total job cost.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage for the region.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax percentage for the region.

inputs.label: Customer Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Optional discount offered to customer (e.g., loyalty, promotion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional discount offered to customer (e.g., loyalty, promotion).

inputs.label: Parts Markup (%)
inputs.businessContext: Markup applied to parts cost to cover handling and profit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Markup applied to parts cost to cover handling and profit.

inputs.label: Job Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts labor time for job difficulty (e.g., engine rebuild vs. oil change).

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjusts labor time for job difficulty (e.g., engine rebuild vs. oil change).

inputs.label: Include Extended Warranty?
inputs.businessContext: Adds a fixed warranty fee to the quote.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adds a fixed warranty fee to the quote.

rules.message: For complex jobs, labor hours should be at least 0.5 hours.
Parts markup below 10% on high-cost parts may indicate pricing error.
Profit margin below 5% is below sustainable threshold (Lean Six Sigma).

thresholds.message: Labor cost is more than 70% of direct costs; verify efficiency.
